task_completion.visual_evidence: The Artifactory web interface is visible, indicating a successful login.

task_completion.description: Select Maven as the package type for a new local repository
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'New Local Repository' screen is visible with 'Maven' selected as the package format.
The 'Repository Key' input field contains the exact text 'project-alpha-snapshots'.

task_completion.description: Configure the repository to handle snapshots
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Handle Snapshots' checkbox or toggle is checked/enabled in the repository configuration settings.

task_completion.description: Set the snapshot retention policy to keep exactly 5 unique versions
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Max Unique Snapshots' input field is set to '5' in the repository configuration settings.

integrity.description: The agent used a web browser to configure Artifactory
integrity.visual_evidence: A web browser window is open navigating the Artifactory UI, rather than terminal windows executing curl or API commands.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the genuine Artifactory application
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the actual Artifactory web interface and configuration forms, not a text editor or static mockup.

integrity.description: The agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the configuration
integrity.visual_evidence: No browser developer tools (Inspect Element, DOM editor) are open to manipulate the visual appearance of the settings.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target repository key: 'project-alpha-snapshots'. Target package type: 'maven'. Expected max unique snapshots: 5. Expected handle snapshots: true. Admin credentials: admin / password.
